creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Another new release from the phpMyAdmin project.  From the announce
message:

   Welcome to phpMyAdmin 2.11.6, a bugfix-only version.

   The release notes and download info are available on
   http://www.phpmyadmin.net.

   Marc Delisle, for the team.

Release notes are at:

https://sourceforge.net/project/shownotes.php?release_id=595781
